WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."landing"."clientes"
),

renamed as (
    SELECT CAST(customer_id AS TEXT) AS customer_id,
    name AS customer_name,
    address AS customer_address,
    phone AS customer_phone,
    email AS customer_email
    FROM source
)
SELECT * FROM renamed

WITH source AS ( 
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."landing"."produtos"
),
renamed AS (
    SELECT
    CAST(product_id AS TEXT) AS product_id,
    name as name_product,
    price as price_product
    FROM source
)

SELECT * FROM renamed

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."landing"."vendas"
),
renamed AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(purchase_id AS TEXT) AS purchase_id,
        CAST(customer_id AS TEXT) AS customer_id,
        CAST(product_id AS TEXT) AS product_id,
        CAST("date" AS DATE) AS purchase_date,
        CAST(quantity AS INT) AS quantity,
        CAST(total_price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS total_price,
        payment_method
        FROM source
)

SELECT * FROM renamed

select customer_id
from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_clientes"
where customer_id is null

select
    customer_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_clientes"
where customer_id is not null
group by customer_id
having count(*) > 1

select product_id
from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_produtos"
where product_id is null

select
    product_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_produtos"
where product_id is not null
group by product_id
having count(*) > 1

WITH clientes AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_clientes"
),
 vendas AS (
    SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_price) AS total_gasto, COUNT(*) AS total_compras
    FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"
    GROUP BY customer_id
 )
SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    c.customer_address,
    c.customer_phone,
    c.customer_email,
    COALESCE (v.total_gasto,0) AS total_gasto,
    COALESCE (v.total_compras,0) AS total_compras
FROM clientes c
LEFT JOIN vendas v ON c.customer_id = v.customer_id
ORDER BY total_compras DESC

WITH produtos AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_produtos"
),

vendas AS (
    SELECT product_id,
    SUM(quantity) AS total_vendido,
    SUM(total_price) AS total_faturado
    FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"
    GROUP BY product_id
)

SELECT 
    p.product_id,
    p.name_product,
    p.price_product,
    COALESCE (v.total_vendido,0) AS total_vendido,
    COALESCE (v.total_faturado,0) AS total_faturado
FROM produtos p
LEFT JOIN vendas v ON p.product_id = v.product_id
ORDER BY total_faturado DESC

with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"
    where customer_id is not null
),

parent as (

    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_clientes"
)

select

    select product_id as from_field

from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"

WITH source AS (

    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."landing"."estorno"

),

renamed AS (

    SELECT
        -- chaves
        CAST(purchase_id AS TEXT)   AS purchase_id,
        CAST(customer_id AS TEXT)   AS customer_id,
        CAST(product_id AS TEXT)    AS product_id,

        -- métricas
        CAST(refund_amount AS numeric(28,6)) AS refund_amount,

        -- dimensões
        CAST(refund_reason AS TEXT)  AS refund_reason,

        -- datas
        CAST(refund_date AS timestamp) AS refund_date,

        -- controle
        now() AS _loaded_at

    FROM source

)

SELECT * FROM renamed

WITH source AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno"
)

SELECT * FROM source

WITH vendas AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"  
),

estornos AS (
    SELECT purchase_id, refund_amount, refund_reason
    FROM "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno"
)
SELECT 
    v.purchase_id,
    v.customer_id,
    v.product_id,
    v.purchase_date,
    v.quantity,
    v.total_price,
    v.payment_method,
    COALESCE(e.refund_amount,0) AS valor_estornado,
    e.refund_reason
FROM vendas v
LEFT JOIN "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno" e ON v.purchase_id = e.purchase_id

with all_values as (

    select
        refund_reason as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno"
    group by refund_reason

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'Produto com defeito','Arrependimento','Entrega Atrasada','Produto Incorreto'
)

with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno"
    where customer_id is not null
),

    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_clientes"
)

select
    from_field

from child

    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    from_field

    select purchase_id as from_field
    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_estorno"
    where purchase_id is not null

parent as (

    from "shoesBR"."staging"."stg_vendas"

select
    from_field

WITH clientes AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_clientes"
),
vendas AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_vendas"
),
estornos AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_estorno"
)
SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    c.customer_phone,
    c.customer_email,
    c.customer_address,
    COALESCE(SUM(v.total_price),0) AS total_gasto,
    COUNT(v.purchase_id) AS total_compras,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.product_id) AS diversidade_produtos,
    COUNT(e.purchase_id) AS total_estornos
FROM clientes c
LEFT JOIN vendas v ON c.customer_id = v.customer_id    
LEFT JOIN estornos e ON v.purchase_id = e.purchase_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.customer_email, c.customer_phone, c.customer_address

WITH produtos AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_produtos"
),
vendas AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_vendas"
),
estornos AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_estorno"
)
SELECT
    p.product_id,
    p.name_product,
    p.price_product,
    COALESCE(SUM(v.quantity),0) AS total_vendido,
    COALESCE(SUM(v.total_price),0) AS total_faturado,
    COALESCE(SUM(e.refund_amount),0) AS total_estornado,
    COUNT(DISTINCT e.purchase_id) AS total_estornos
FROM produtos P
LEFT JOIN vendas v ON p.product_id = v.product_id    
LEFT JOIN estornos e ON v.purchase_id = e.purchase_id
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name_product, p.price_product

WITH vendas AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_vendas"
),
estornos AS(
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_estorno"
),

clientes AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_clientes"
),

produtos AS (
    SELECT * FROM "shoesBR"."intermediate"."int_produtos"
)

SELECT
    v.purchase_id,
    v.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    c.customer_email,
    v.product_id,
    p.name_product,
    v.purchase_date,
    v.quantity,
    v.total_price,
    v.payment_method,
    COALESCE(e.refund_amount,0) AS valor_estornado,
    e.refund_reason,
    (v.total_price - COALESCE(e.refund_amount,0)) AS receita_liquida
FROM vendas v
LEFT JOIN estornos e ON v.purchase_id = e.purchase_id
LEFT JOIN clientes c ON v.customer_id = c.customer_id 
LEFT JOIN produtos p ON v.product_id  = p.product_id
